questions.stem: Please be ___ when you cross the road.
questions.explain: 過馬路時請小心。be 動詞後接形容詞，用 careful＝小心的。

questions.stem: My father works for a big ___.
questions.explain: 我爸爸在一家大公司上班。company＝公司（accompany 是動詞）。

questions.stem: Can you ___ this big team alone?
questions.explain: 你能一個人管理這個大團隊嗎？can 後接原形動詞 manage＝管理。

questions.stem: There is a good ___ for being late.
questions.explain: 遲到有一個好理由。冠詞 a 後接名詞 reason＝理由。

questions.stem: She will ___ a new dress for me.
questions.explain: 她會幫我設計一件新洋裝。will 後接原形動詞 design＝設計。

questions.stem: The teacher gave us a hard ___.
questions.explain: 老師給我們一份很難的作業。a hard 後接名詞 assignment＝作業。

questions.stem: I want to ___ around the world.
questions.explain: 我想要環遊世界。to 後接原形動詞 travel＝旅遊。

questions.stem: A ___ is taking photos over there.
questions.explain: 有一位觀光客正在那邊拍照。A 後接名詞 tourist＝觀光客。

questions.stem: We should ___ paper and bottles.
questions.explain: 我們應該回收紙張和瓶子。should 後接原形動詞 recycle＝回收。

questions.stem: The ___ in that restaurant is very good.
questions.explain: 那家餐廳的服務很好。The 後接名詞 service＝服務。

questions.stem: Doctors work hard to fight this ___.
questions.explain: 醫生努力對抗這種疾病。disease＝疾病。

questions.stem: You must wear a ___ when you are sick.
questions.explain: 生病時你必須戴口罩。mask＝口罩；面具。

questions.stem: Many countries join the ___ every four years.
questions.explain: 許多國家每四年參加奧運。Olympic Games＝奧林匹克運動會。

questions.stem: The heavy rain may ___ our flight.
questions.explain: 大雨可能會延誤我們的班機。delay＝延遲；耽擱。

questions.stem: We had a fun ___ to the beach.
questions.explain: 我們去海邊玩了一趟很開心。trip＝旅行；外出。

questions.stem: Now I am ___ ride a bike alone.
questions.explain: 現在我能自己騎腳踏車了。be able to + 原形動詞＝能夠。

questions.stem: She wants to ___ a new job.
questions.explain: 她想申請一份新工作。apply for＝申請。

questions.stem: It is cold. Please ___ your coat.
questions.explain: 天氣很冷，請穿上你的外套。put on＝穿上。

questions.stem: A: What time is it now? B: ___
questions.explain: 問「現在幾點」，答時間：It is nine o'clock（九點）。

questions.stem: A: What day is it today? B: ___
questions.explain: 問「今天星期幾」，答星期：It is Friday（星期五）。

questions.stem: A: What is the date today? B: ___
questions.explain: 問「今天幾號」，答日期：It is April tenth（四月十號）。

questions.stem: A: What is the weather like today? B: ___
questions.explain: 問「今天天氣如何」，答天氣：It is rainy（下雨）。

questions.stem: She writes every word very ___.
questions.explain: 她每個字都寫得很仔細。動詞後用副詞 carefully＝仔細地。

questions.stem: Will you ___ me to the hospital?
questions.explain: 你願意陪我去醫院嗎？will 後接原形動詞 accompany＝陪同。

questions.stem: My uncle is the ___ of a bank.
questions.explain: 我叔叔是一家銀行的經理。the 後接名詞 manager＝經理。

questions.stem: The price of this bag is very ___.
questions.explain: 這個包包的價錢很合理。be 動詞後接形容詞 reasonable＝合理的。

questions.stem: My sister is a famous dress ___.
questions.explain: 我姐姐是有名的服裝設計師。名詞 designer＝設計師。

questions.stem: The boss will ___ the work to us.
questions.explain: 老闆會把工作分派給我們。will 後接原形動詞 assign＝分派。

questions.stem: A ___ needs a map in a new city.
questions.explain: 旅客在陌生城市需要一張地圖。A 後接名詞 traveler＝旅客。

questions.stem: We took a bus ___ around the city.
questions.explain: 我們搭巴士在城市裡觀光。a bus 後接名詞 tour＝觀光行程。

questions.stem: Spring, summer, fall, and winter make a ___.
questions.explain: 春夏秋冬形成一個循環。a 後接名詞 cycle＝循環。

questions.stem: The staff will ___ dinner at six.
questions.explain: 服務生會在六點供應晚餐。will 後接原形動詞 serve＝供應。

questions.stem: Eating too much sugar can cause ___.
questions.explain: 吃太多糖會導致疾病。disease＝疾病。

questions.stem: The thief hid his face with a ___.
questions.explain: 小偷用面具遮住他的臉。mask＝面具。

questions.stem: Athletes train hard for the ___.
questions.explain: 運動員為了奧運努力訓練。Olympic Games＝奧林匹克運動會。

questions.stem: Do not ___ your homework until night.
questions.explain: 不要把功課拖到晚上。delay＝延遲；拖延。

questions.stem: They took a school ___ to the farm.
questions.explain: 他們去農場做了一趟校外教學。trip＝旅行；外出。

questions.stem: My grandma is not ___ walk fast.
questions.explain: 我奶奶沒辦法走很快。be able to + 原形動詞＝能夠。

questions.stem: You can ___ the scholarship online.
questions.explain: 你可以線上申請獎學金。apply for＝申請。

questions.stem: He ate too much and ___ ten kilograms.
questions.explain: 他吃太多，增加了十公斤。put on＝增（重）（過去式 put 不變）。

questions.stem: A: Do you have the time? B: ___
questions.explain: 問「現在幾點」，答時間：It is half past seven（七點半）。

questions.stem: A: What day is today? B: ___
questions.explain: 問「今天星期幾」，答星期：It is Saturday（星期六）。

questions.stem: A: What is the date tomorrow? B: ___
questions.explain: 問「明天幾號」，答日期：It is December first（十二月一號）。

questions.stem: A: What will the weather be like tomorrow? B: ___
questions.explain: 問「明天天氣如何」，答天氣：It will be sunny（會是晴天）。
